artifacts.summary: Definitive analysis: D=Int approach FORBIDDEN by ROAD_MAP; truth lemma requires ALL F/P witnesses (not just subformulas); tree-structured witnesses cannot linearize to Int chain; Task 986 should be BLOCKED/ABANDONED

Teammate B alternative path analysis: D=Int not necessary for completeness; CanonicalMCS lacks AddCommGroup; strict < vs <= gap identified and bridgeable; recommended path via strengthened CanonicalMCS FMCS + multi-family modal saturation for task 987

next_steps: Synthesize Teammate A and B findings; update task 986 status; redirect task 987 to CanonicalMCS-based completeness path (strengthen temporal_coherent_family_exists_CanonicalMCS to strict <, build BFMCS CanonicalMCS via modal saturation, prove CanonicalMCS truth lemma)

key_insights: valid phi quantifies over ALL D; completeness needs only ONE countermodel in ONE D - D=Int is not mandatory
CanonicalMCS has Preorder but not AddCommGroup; cannot be used as TaskFrame D parameter directly
temporal_coherent_family_exists_CanonicalMCS uses <= for F/P, but BFMCS.temporally_coherent needs strict <
CanonicalR is irreflexive, so witness MCS is strictly greater; the <= can be strengthened to < with a proof fix
Recommended task 987 path: strengthen to strict <, build BFMCS CanonicalMCS via modal saturation, prove CanonicalMCS truth lemma
